sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khris le A Pawlpi ading, lung kituakin i ding;
Kam le muk tawh phat ni, A thanemte huh
Khe tawh mangthang zong ni, Khris le Pawlpi ading.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I nuntakna i kipiata, Khris le Pawlpi ading.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: ading, thungen in sem den ding;
Lawpna, hanna thak tawh, Na khat peuh sem pel mawh;
zuihna tawh, Khris le Pawlpi ading.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong suakta sak khin a, zawhna hong ciam man’ ah;
